title: In Campinas-SP, an air traffic controller reported a UFO sighting [1983]
excerpt: December 27th, 1983. Time: 00:57. Duration: not determined. An operator from the Control Tower at the Campinas Airport, in the State of São Paulo, reported that he received “many phone calls about an unidentified object in his North / Northeast sector”. text_preview: December 27th, 1983. Time: 00:57. Duration: not determined. An operator from the Control Tower at the Campinas Airport, in the State of São Paulo, reported that he received “many phone calls about an unidentified object in his North / Northeast sector”. The witness stated that he had seen some lights, but that he was unable to estimate what they were, but obtained information that the UFO was about 13NM [nautical miles] from Campinas. Complementary Data: “At 04:08 the OI requested video recording, which was done from 0410 to 0420. A meteorological observation letter was requested and the opera
summary: On Dec 27, 1983, a Campinas Airport tower operator received multiple public calls about a UFO ~13 NM north-northeast; radar video was recorded and small plots appeared briefly before contact was lost.
